name: Shrimp and Sweet Corn Ravioli with Corn Coulis and Blackpepper
recipeIngredient: 4 ears of corn, kernels removed from cob, cobs reserved
1 spice bag (1/2 bay leaf, 1 sprig of thyme, 10 white peppercorns, 5 parsley stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, heat olive oil and cook onions until transparent.
2. Add corn and continue cooking until very tender, about 7 - 10 minutes.
3. Set aside. Slice the cobs.
4. Place cob slices in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and add the spice bag.
5. Let simmer until you have 2 cups of liquid. Strain the broth and discard the cobs and spice bag.
6. Add the strained broth to the onions and corn mixture. Let simmer for about 5 minutes.
7. Transfer to a food processor and process until smooth.
8. Pass through a strainer and season with salt, pepper, and cayenne to taste.
9. Whisk in butter. Set aside and keep warm.
